NexaCore Technologies — Company, Products & Courses

About NexaCore Technologies

NexaCore Technologies is an AI solutions company headquartered in Dubai, UAE, with a regional office in Singapore.

Founded in 2021, NexaCore helps businesses in the Middle East and Southeast Asia adopt artificial intelligence through products, courses, and custom development services.
